title: Sahaquiel and Matariel
wikitext:
[]: Sahaquiel and Matariel             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Dec 02, 2006 12:46 am y do those 2 Angels have Eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 02, 2006 2:21 am Why is the same sort of eye of the illuminati on the dollar bill? http://images.google.com/images?svnum=10&hl=en&lr=&safe=off&q=eye+illuminati&btnG=Search

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Sat Dec 02, 2006 11:14 am It's pretty.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Dec 02, 2006 2:02 pm its just weird that those 2 Angels have those kind of eyes and the rest dont. im not even sure they use them properly because u c Matariel oozing acid out of 1 of its Eyes

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Dec 02, 2006 3:24 pm You forgot Adam, Lilith, Kaworu, the Evas, and the Lilim. An arguement could be made for Sachiel, Gaghiel, Israfel, Sandalphon, and Zeruel even if they are just black dots.

[]:             Quote Post by directedition » Sat Dec 02, 2006 5:03 pm I always viewed those giant eyes to be more like the 'eyes' many butterflies and moths have on their wings.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Dec 03, 2006 12:27 am I wonder whether those are real eyes. Or just patterns?

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Sun Dec 03, 2006 10:39 am directedition wrote: I always viewed those giant eyes to be more like the 'eyes' many butterflies and moths have on their wings.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 03, 2006 9:08 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: You forgot Adam, Lilith, Kaworu, the Evas, and the Lilim. An arguement could be made for Sachiel, Gaghiel, Israfel, Sandalphon, and Zeruel even if they are just black dots.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:47 am the eys on matariel are where the acid comes out so theyer at least real...and not decorations in the aspect that they are an opening...weither or not that can see is unkown... ...and Sahaquiel just looks like a five year old drew it...?????

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Dec 04, 2006 8:58 am Sachiel_13 wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: You forgot Adam, Lilith, Kaworu, the Evas, and the Lilim. An arguement could be made for Sachiel, Gaghiel, Israfel, Sandalphon, and Zeruel even if they are just black dots.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 08, 2006 1:00 am it wouldnt b that suspicious if only 1 of the 18 Angels had that kind of eye, but the fact that there was 2 of them. maybe there its a direct relation to their Cores it doesnt seem to show their Cores at all, so maybe, their behind the eyes????

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 08, 2006 7:43 am Sahaquiel was huge so it's core didn't stand out, but it was there since Asuka stabbed it there to kill it.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Dec 08, 2006 9:20 am Their eyes are there to look good. There's no point in seeking a meaning behind them, it's overanalysing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 08, 2006 11:01 am MaggotMaster wrote: Their eyes are there to look good. There's no point in seeking a meaning behind them, it's overanalysing.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 08, 2006 11:03 am Cause it's a SEELE coverup!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Dec 08, 2006 11:55 am Shamshel's "eyes" are definitely fake eyespots. I think the design notes said something about that.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Fri Dec 08, 2006 1:27 pm thing is, Sahaquiel actually wanted flame designs, but Gainax Customs didn't have that vynal

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 13, 2006 12:39 am felineki wrote: Shamshel's "eyes" are definitely fake eyespots. I think the design notes said something about that.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Dec 14, 2006 11:57 pm And where, exactly, does it say that SEELE is responsible for the Angel attacks?
